content: Writing updated tests for input validation.

function.name: bash
function.arguments:
{"command":"cat > api/test_goodbye_validation.py << 'EOF'
import pytest
from app import app

def test_goodbye_rejects_empty_body():
    client = app.test_client()
    resp = client.post('/goodbye', json={})
    assert resp.status_code == 400

def test_goodbye_rejects_missing_name():
    client = app.test_client()
    resp = client.post('/goodbye', data='not json', content_type='text/plain')
    assert resp.status_code == 400
EOF"}
